Index: content/docs/components/text-highlight-annotation.mdx
===================================================================
--- content/docs/components/text-highlight-annotation.mdx	
+++ content/docs/components/text-highlight-annotation.mdx	
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+---
+title: Text Highlight Annotation
+description: Animated text annotation with highlight, underline, box, circle, strike-through, crossed-off, and bracket actions using rough notation.
+---
+
+import HighlighterDemo from "@/demo/text-highlight-annotation-demo";
+
+<ComponentPreview name="text-highlight-annotation">
+  <HighlighterDemo />
+</ComponentPreview>
+
+## Installation
+
+If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:
+
+<CodeBlockCommand
+  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
+  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
+  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
+  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
+/>
+
+Otherwise, use the full registry URL:
+
+<CodeBlockCommand
+  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
+  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
+  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
+  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
+/>
+
+## Usage
+
+After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:
+
+```tsx
+"use client";
+
+import { TextHighlighterAnnotation } from "@/components/prsui/text-highlight-annotation";
+
+export function MyComponent() {
+  return (
+    <TextHighlighterAnnotation
+      action="highlight"
+      color="#ffd1dc"
+      strokeWidth={1.5}
+      animationDuration={600}
+      iterations={2}
+      padding={2}
+      multiline={true}
+    >
+      Highlighted text
+    </TextHighlighterAnnotation>
+  );
+}
+```
+
+## Props
+
+| Prop                | Type               | Default       | Description                                                   |
+| ------------------- | ------------------ | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
+| `children`          | `React.ReactNode`  | -             | The text content to annotate.                                 |
+| `action`            | `AnnotationAction` | `"highlight"` | The annotation action type.                                   |
+| `color`             | `string`           | `"#ffd1dc"`   | The annotation color (CSS color string).                      |
+| `strokeWidth`       | `number`           | `1.5`         | The stroke width of the annotation.                           |
+| `animationDuration` | `number`           | `600`         | The duration of the animation in milliseconds.                |
+| `iterations`        | `number`           | `2`           | The number of animation iterations.                           |
+| `padding`           | `number`           | `2`           | The padding around the annotation.                            |
+| `multiline`         | `boolean`          | `true`        | Whether the annotation supports multiline text.               |
+| `isView`            | `boolean`          | `false`       | Whether to wait for the element to be in view before showing. |
+
+## Annotation Actions
+
+The `action` prop supports the following values:
+
+| Action           | Description                        |
+| ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
+| `highlight`      | A background highlight annotation. |
+| `underline`      | An underline annotation.           |
+| `box`            | A box outline annotation.          |
+| `circle`         | A circle outline annotation.       |
+| `strike-through` | A strikethrough annotation.        |
+| `crossed-off`    | A crossed-off annotation.          |
+| `bracket`        | A bracket annotation.              |

---
title: Text Highlight
description: Animated text highlight with customizable direction, color, and trigger types.
---

import TextHighlighterDemo from "@/demo/text-highlight-demo";

<ComponentPreview name="text-highlight">
  <TextHighlighterDemo />
</ComponentPreview>

## Installation

If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight"
/>

Otherwise, use the full registry URL:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight.json"
/>

## Usage

After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:

```tsx
"use client";

import { TextHighlighter } from "@/components/prsui/text-highlight";

export function MyComponent() {
  return (
    <TextHighlighter
      as="p"
      className="text-4xl font-medium"
      highlightColor="hsl(25, 90%, 80%)"
      direction="ltr"
    >
      Highlighted text
    </TextHighlighter>
  );
}
```

## Props

| Prop               | Type                                     | Default                   | Description                                              |
| ------------------ | ---------------------------------------- | ------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| `children`         | `React.ReactNode`                        | -                         | The text content to be highlighted.                      |
| `as`               | `ElementType`                            | `"span"`                  | HTML element to render as.                               |
| `triggerType`      | `"hover" \| "ref" \| "inView" \| "auto"` | `"inView"`                | How to trigger the animation.                            |
| `transition`       | `Transition`                             | `{ type: "spring", ... }` | Animation transition configuration.                      |
| `useInViewOptions` | `UseInViewOptions`                       | `{ once: true, ... }`     | Options for useInView hook when triggerType is "inView". |
| `className`        | `string`                                 | -                         | Class name for the container element.                    |
| `highlightColor`   | `string`                                 | `"hsl(25, 90%, 80%)"`     | Highlight color (CSS color string).                      |
| `direction`        | `"ltr" \| "rtl" \| "ttb" \| "btt"`       | `"ltr"`                   | Direction of the highlight animation.                    |

## Ref Methods

The component exposes a ref with the following methods:

| Method                | Description                      |
| --------------------- | -------------------------------- |
| `animate(direction?)` | Trigger the highlight animation. |
| `reset()`             | Reset the highlight animation.   |

input.content:
---
title: Text Highlight Annotation
description: Animated text annotation with highlight, underline, box, circle, strike-through, crossed-off, and bracket actions using rough notation.
---

import HighlighterDemo from "@/demo/text-highlight-annotation-demo";

<ComponentPreview name="text-highlight-annotation">
  <HighlighterDemo />
</ComponentPreview>

## Installation

If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
/>

Otherwise, use the full registry URL:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
/>

## Usage

After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:

```tsx
"use client";

import { TextHighlighterAnnotation } from "@/components/prsui/text-highlight-annotation";

export function MyComponent() {
  return (
    <TextHighlighterAnnotation
      action="highlight"
      color="#ffd1dc"
      strokeWidth={1.5}
      animationDuration={600}
      iterations={2}
      padding={2}
      multiline={true}
    >
      Highlighted text
    </TextHighlighterAnnotation>
  );
}
```

## Props

| Prop                    | Type            | Default      | Description                                                  |
| ----------------------- | --------------- | ------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `children`              | `React.ReactNode` | -          | The text content to annotate.                              |
| `action`                | `AnnotationAction` | `"highlight"` | The annotation action type.                                |
| `color`                 | `string`        | `"#ffd1dc"`  | The annotation color (CSS color string).                   |
| `strokeWidth`           | `number`        | `1.5`        | The stroke width of the annotation.                        |
| `animationDuration`     | `number`        | `600`        | The duration of the animation in milliseconds.             |
| `iterations`            | `number`        | `2`          | The number of animation iterations.                        |
| `padding`               | `number`        | `2`          | The padding around the annotation.                         |
| `multiline`             | `boolean`       | `true`       | Whether the annotation supports multiline text.            |
| `isView`                | `boolean`       | `false`      | Whether to wait for the element to be in view before showing. |

## Annotation Actions

The `action` prop supports the following values:

| Action             | Description                          |
| ------------------ | ------------------------------------ |
| `highlight`        | A background highlight annotation.   |
| `underline`        | An underline annotation.             |
| `box`              | A box outline annotation.            |
| `circle`           | A circle outline annotation.         |
| `strike-through`   | A strikethrough annotation.          |
| `crossed-off`      | A crossed-off annotation.            |
| `bracket`          | A bracket annotation.                |

The issue is that when changing `export function TextHighlighterAnnotation({...}: HighlighterProps)` to `export const TextHighlighterAnnotation = ({...}: HighlighterProps)`, TypeScript syntax `: HighlighterProps` after destructuring parameters needs a return type annotation when used as a const arrow function. 

The problem is that when you do `const f = ({...}: Type) => ...`, you need to handle the type differently. There are two approaches:
1. Use `function` keyword: `export const TextHighlighterAnnotation = function({...}: HighlighterProps) { ... }`
2. Use an arrow with a type annotation on a separate variable

Let me fix this by using the `function` keyword approach.
The `export const X = (args: Type)` syntax doesn't work directly with TypeScript. Fixing the component to use `export const X = function(...)`

 ## Installation
 
 If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:
 
 <CodeBlockCommand
   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
 />
 
 Otherwise, use the full registry URL:
 
 <CodeBlockCommand
   __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
 />
 
 ## Usage
 
 After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:
 
 ```tsx
 "use client";
 
 import { TextHighlighterAnnotation } from "@/components/prsui/text-highlight-annotation";
 
 export function MyComponent() {
   return (
     <TextHighlighterAnnotation
       action="highlight"
       color="#ffd1dc"
       strokeWidth={1.5}
       animationDuration={600}
       iterations={2}
       padding={2}
       multiline={true}
     >
       Highlighted text
     </TextHighlighterAnnotation>
   );
 }
 ```
 
 ## Props
 
 | Prop                | Type               | Default       | Description                                                   |
 | ------------------- | ------------------ | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
 | `children`          | `React.ReactNode`  | -             | The text content to annotate.                                 |
 | `action`            | `AnnotationAction` | `"highlight"` | The annotation action type.                                   |
 | `color`             | `string`           | `"#ffd1dc"`   | The annotation color (CSS color string).                      |
 | `strokeWidth`       | `number`           | `1.5`         | The stroke width of the annotation.                           |
 | `animationDuration` | `number`           | `600`         | The duration of the animation in milliseconds.                |
 | `iterations`        | `number`           | `2`           | The number of animation iterations.                           |
 | `padding`           | `number`           | `2`           | The padding around the annotation.                            |
 | `multiline`         | `boolean`          | `true`        | Whether the annotation supports multiline text.               |
 | `isView`            | `boolean`          | `false`       | Whether to wait for the element to be in view before showing. |
 
 ## Annotation Actions
 
 The `action` prop supports the following values:
 
 | Action           | Description                        |
 | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
 | `highlight`      | A background highlight annotation. |
 | `underline`      | An underline annotation.           |
 | `box`            | A box outline annotation.          |
 | `circle`         | A circle outline annotation.       |
 | `strike-through` | A strikethrough annotation.        |
 | `crossed-off`    | A crossed-off annotation.          |
 | `bracket`        | A bracket annotation.              |

+++ content/docs/components/text-annotation.mdx	
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+---
+title: Text Highlight Annotation
+description: Animated text annotation with highlight, underline, box, circle, strike-through, crossed-off, and bracket actions using rough notation.
+---
+
+import { HighlighterDemo } from "@/demo/text-annotation-demo";
+
+<ComponentPreview name="text-annotation">
+  <HighlighterDemo />
+</ComponentPreview>
+
+## Installation
+
+If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:
+
+<CodeBlockCommand
+  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-annotation"
+  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-annotation"
+  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-annotation"
+  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-annotation"
+/>
+
+Otherwise, use the full registry URL:
+
+<CodeBlockCommand
+  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-annotation.json"
+  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-annotation.json"
+  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-annotation.json"
+  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-annotation.json"
+/>
+
+## Usage
+
+After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:
+
+```tsx
+"use client";
+
+import { TextAnnotation } from "@/components/prsui/text-annotation";
+
+export function MyComponent() {
+  return (
+    <TextAnnotation
+      action="highlight"
+      color="#ffd1dc"
+      strokeWidth={1.5}
+      animationDuration={600}
+      iterations={2}
+      padding={2}
+      multiline={true}
+    >
+      Highlighted text
+    </TextAnnotation>
+  );
+}
+```
+
+## Props
+
+| Prop                | Type               | Default       | Description                                                   |
+| ------------------- | ------------------ | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
+| `children`          | `React.ReactNode`  | -             | The text content to annotate.                                 |
+| `action`            | `AnnotationAction` | `"highlight"` | The annotation action type.                                   |
+| `color`             | `string`           | `"#ffd1dc"`   | The annotation color (CSS color string).                      |
+| `strokeWidth`       | `number`           | `1.5`         | The stroke width of the annotation.                           |
+| `animationDuration` | `number`           | `600`         | The duration of the animation in milliseconds.                |
+| `iterations`        | `number`           | `2`           | The number of animation iterations.                           |
+| `padding`           | `number`           | `2`           | The padding around the annotation.                            |
+| `multiline`         | `boolean`          | `true`        | Whether the annotation supports multiline text.               |
+| `isView`            | `boolean`          | `false`       | Whether to wait for the element to be in view before showing. |
+
+## Annotation Actions
+
+The `action` prop supports the following values:
+
+| Action           | Description                        |
+| ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
+| `highlight`      | A background highlight annotation. |
+| `underline`      | An underline annotation.           |
+| `box`            | A box outline annotation.          |
+| `circle`         | A circle outline annotation.       |
+| `strike-through` | A strikethrough annotation.        |
+| `crossed-off`    | A crossed-off annotation.          |
+| `bracket`        | A bracket annotation.              |

---
title: Text Highlight Annotation
description: Animated text annotation with highlight, underline, box, circle, strike-through, crossed-off, and bracket actions using rough notation.
---

import { HighlighterDemo } from "@/demo/text-highlight-annotation-demo";

<ComponentPreview name="text-highlight-annotation">
  <HighlighterDemo />
</ComponentPreview>

## Installation

If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/text-highlight-annotation"
/>

Otherwise, use the full registry URL:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/text-highlight-annotation.json"
/>

## Usage

After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:

```tsx
"use client";

import { TextHighlighterAnnotation } from "@/components/prsui/text-highlight-annotation";

export function MyComponent() {
  return (
    <TextHighlighterAnnotation
      action="highlight"
      color="#ffd1dc"
      strokeWidth={1.5}
      animationDuration={600}
      iterations={2}
      padding={2}
      multiline={true}
    >
      Highlighted text
    </TextHighlighterAnnotation>
  );
}
```

## Props

| Prop                | Type               | Default       | Description                                                   |
| ------------------- | ------------------ | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `children`          | `React.ReactNode`  | -             | The text content to annotate.                                 |
| `action`            | `AnnotationAction` | `"highlight"` | The annotation action type.                                   |
| `color`             | `string`           | `"#ffd1dc"`   | The annotation color (CSS color string).                      |
| `strokeWidth`       | `number`           | `1.5`         | The stroke width of the annotation.                           |
| `animationDuration` | `number`           | `600`         | The duration of the animation in milliseconds.                |
| `iterations`        | `number`           | `2`           | The number of animation iterations.                           |
| `padding`           | `number`           | `2`           | The padding around the annotation.                            |
| `multiline`         | `boolean`          | `true`        | Whether the annotation supports multiline text.               |
| `isView`            | `boolean`          | `false`       | Whether to wait for the element to be in view before showing. |

## Annotation Actions

The `action` prop supports the following values:

| Action           | Description                        |
| ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `highlight`      | A background highlight annotation. |
| `underline`      | An underline annotation.           |
| `box`            | A box outline annotation.          |
| `circle`         | A circle outline annotation.       |
| `strike-through` | A strikethrough annotation.        |
| `crossed-off`    | A crossed-off annotation.          |
| `bracket`        | A bracket annotation.              |
